title: Figures of mirrored columns doesn’t work in Dashboard or Widgets

posts.author: KenanSeba (Kenan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I can’t display figures of displaying figures of mirrored columns does not work in Dashboard or Widgets.
How to solve that?

Note: As workaround I’ve used duplicated column reflecting the mirrored column by using formula which is not very comfortable.

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Kenan. There is a workaround for this by using VLOOKUP marketplace app as an alternative to connected boards.

posts.author: KenanSeba (Kenan)
posts.cookedHtml:
This App is offline for maintenance

Many thnx for the recommendation, I would love to try it!
but unfortunately I can’t right now…

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
@KenanSeba I checked and all system are live - Can you try installing VLOOKUP for monday.com again using the link?

Here is a short step by step setup guide

posts.author: evernon9 (Erica Vernon)
posts.cookedHtml: I am struggling with this. I want to standardize the same data across multiple boards so I am using mirrored columns. However, I would also like to standardize the view when you open an item to show the item card and the “Notes” column with a text widget. I can only do this on the board that is being mirrored and not he boards that include the mirrored data. This should be an option since the format of the column is still text.

posts.author: Kimc (Kim Collie)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve done the same work around, leading to many duplicate status columns which is hard to explain to users.
